evals.prompt: search papers on machine learning for interacting quantum atoms and IQA energy decomposition, give me 20 papers sorted by impact score
evals.expected_output: papers.json file with ≥10 papers, human-readable summary, coverage statement, security warnings if applicable

assertions.name: papers.json has valid schema (meta + papers keys)
every paper has DOI or arXiv ID (no orphans)

evals.prompt: find recent papers on graph neural networks for molecular property prediction, last 2 years, at least 5 citations, comp-chem domain
evals.expected_output: papers.json with date filter, min_citations filter, domain=comp-chem in meta

assertions.name: meta contains from_date (date filter was applied)
no paper with known citations < 5 (min-citations filter applied)
every paper has DOI or arXiv ID

evals.prompt: chase the citations of this paper: 10.1021/acs.jctc.1c00537 — both forward and backward, give me all papers that cite it and all its references
evals.expected_output: papers.json with chase_type field set, chase_source in meta, ≥1 paper found

assertions.name: papers have chase_type field set (citing or cited_by)
every paper has DOI or arXiv ID
